metadata.description: Pulso — five-line Claude Code statusline: tokens, model + reasoning effort + thinking, session rate-limits + cost + diff impact, MCP and hook counts, and a soft-wrapped enabled-skills list with active-skill highlight.

plugins.name: pulso
plugins.description: Five-line Claude Code statusline: token breakdown (cached/new/total/ctx%), model + reasoning effort + thinking + Claude Code version, session rate-limits + cost + diff impact + duration, MCP and hook counts, and a soft-wrapped enabled-skills list with active-skill highlight. Auto-wires on SessionStart with idempotent silent install. Ships /pulso:setup slash command for explicit one-shot setup. Optionally delegates to oh-my-claudecode HUD when present.
